case_title: S.F. AUTOMOTIVE PARTS WAREHOUSE, INC. VS. JUAN JAIRO CASTILLO

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,257.00 FILED BY S.F. AUTOMOTIVE PARTS WAREHOUSE, INC. DBA MACKENZIE WAREHOUSE AS TO DEFENDANT CASTILLO, JUAN JAIRO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-07-2010 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF S.F. AUTOMOTIVE PARTS WAREHOUSE, INC. DBA MACKENZIE WAREHOUSE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CASTILLO, JUAN JAIRO $1,257.00 PRINCIPAL, $40.98 INTEREST, $120.44 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,418.42, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $90.44) SERVED AUG-16-2010, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CASTILLO, JUAN JAIRO
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-07-2010 - JUDGMENT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
